query: SELECT p.name, sq.id as sq_id, sq.quoteNumber, s.name as supplier_name FROM projects p JOIN supplier_quotes sq ON sq.projectId = p.id JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = sq.supplierId WHERE p.name LIKE '%Tingalpa%' OR p.name LIKE '%tingalpa%' OR p.name LIKE '%Hotel%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ro2tCDef8YTuRV.root --database 89sPt5WznQmH7pHfxEjFRd --execute SELECT p.name, sq.id as sq_id, sq.quoteNumber, s.name as supplier_name FROM projects p JOIN supplier_quotes sq ON sq.projectId = p.id JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = sq.supplierId WHERE p.name LIKE '%Tingalpa%' OR p.name LIKE '%tingalpa%' OR p.name LIKE '%Hotel%';
